zh.lifeSummary: 當Claas Willemsz van Deventer於大約1475年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德米德爾可普時，他的父親Willem Van Arkel36歲，母親Marigjen Evertsen de Bar32歲。他於1504年3月9日與Mary Hendricxsdr.在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆被列為heemraad。他去世於1538年10月23日在荷蘭-拉藍德米德爾可普享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Claas Willemsz van Deventer于大约1475年出生在荷兰-拉藍德米德爾可普时，他的父亲Willem Van Arkel36岁，母亲Marigjen Evertsen de Bar32岁。他于1504年3月9日与Mary Hendricxsdr.在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆被列为heemraad。他去世于1538年10月23日在荷兰-拉藍德米德爾可普享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Claas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Willemsz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: patronymic from   Willem  . The surname of Flemish and German origin is also common in the Walloon part of Belgium (especially in its German-speaking part).

variants.name: Willem
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Beginning of the rule of the Austrian Habsburgs.
The Netherlands is inherited by the future Habsburg Emperor and King of Spain Charles V.
The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.

en.lifeSummary: When Claas Willemsz van Deventer was born about 1475, in Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Willem Van Arkel, was 36 and his mother, Marigjen Evertsen de Bar, was 32. He married Mary Hendricxsdr. on 9 March 1504, in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as heemraad in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands. He died on 23 October 1538, in Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Claas Willemsz van Deventer est né environ 1475, à Middelkoop, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Willem Van Arkel, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marigjen Evertsen de Bar, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mary Hendricxsdr. le 9 mars 1504, à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est heemraad à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1538, à Middelkoop, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Claas Willemsz van Deventer um 1475 in Middelkoop, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willem Van Arkel 36 und seine Mutter Marigjen Evertsen de Bar 32. Er hat am 9. März 1504 in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande Mary Hendricxsdr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als heemraad in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1538 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Middelkoop, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Claas Willemsz van Deventer è nato il circa 1475 nel Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Willem Van Arkel, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Marigjen Evertsen de Bar, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mary Hendricxsdr. il 9 marzo 1504, nel Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come heemraad nel Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Morì il 23 ottobre 1538, nel Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Claas Willemsz van Deventerが約1475年にオランダズイド-hオランドミッドエルコオップで生まれた時，父Willem Van Arkelは36歳，母Marigjen Evertsen de Barは32歳であった。1504年3月9日にオランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムでMary Hendricxsdr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。オランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムでの職業はheemraadと記録されている。彼は1538年10月23日にオランダズイド-hオランドミッドエルコオップで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Claas Willemsz van Deventer(이)가 대략 1475년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 미델코프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willem Van Arkel(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Marigjen Evertsen de Bar(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1504년 3월 9일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에서 Mary Hendricxsdr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에서 heemraad이었다. 그는 1538년 10월 23일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 미델코프에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Claas Willemsz van Deventer nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Willem Van Arkel, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Marigjen Evertsen de Bar, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Hendricxsdr. em 9 de março de 1504, em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como heemraad em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1538, em Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 64 anos.

ro.Arkel, , South Holland, Netherlands: Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Claas Willemsz van Deventer родился около 1475 г. в местности мидделкуп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Willem Van Arkel было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marigjen Evertsen de Bar, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hendricxsdr. 9 марта 1504 г. в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии heemraad в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер 23 октября 1538 г. в местности мидделкуп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Claas Willemsz van Deventer nació aproximadamente 1475, en Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Willem Van Arkel, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marigjen Evertsen de Bar, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mary Hendricxsdr. el 9 de marzo de 1504, en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era heemraad en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1538, en Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 64 años.
